changes: Implemented success rate calculation: (done / (done + failed)) * 100.0 in `calculate_stats` function
Updated `print_summary` to display 'success rate X%' in output
Added 4 unit tests covering all success rate scenarios

patterns_discovered.pattern: Optional stats field with None fallback
patterns_discovered.context: success_rate_pct is Option<f64>, returns None when no completed cards exist
Checks (done + failed > 0) before calculating percentage to avoid division by zero
Uses rate.round() as u64 to convert float percentage to clean integer display
Tests for 75%, 0%, 100%, and None (no completed cards) scenarios

gotchas_discovered.manifestation: Could occur when calculating done / (done + failed)
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Guarded with conditional check: if done + failed > 0

gotchas_discovered.manifestation: Raw f64 could show '93.33333333%' instead of '93%'
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Applied .round() before casting to u64 for clean display

approach_outcome.strategy: Single implementation achieved on first try
key_success_factors: Proper handling of edge cases (no completed cards, all failed, all done)
Clear display formatting matching requirement 'success rate X%'

recommendations.suggestion: Consider adding similar optional fields for other useful rates (e.g., failure_rate, completion_rate for pending+running)
Verify if rounding to nearest percent is preferred; consider if decimal places would be useful for analysis
Consider adding doc comments to CardStats explaining what success_rate_pct represents and when it's None
